problem.title: Sort array of 0s, 1s, and 2s
problem.description: Given an array containing only 0s, 1s, and 2s, sort it in linear time.
assumptions: In-place, one pass (Dutch National Flag algorithm).

example.explanation: Dutch National Flag problem: three pointers (low, mid, high). One pass, O(1) space.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Dutch National Flag [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Use three pointers — low, mid, and high — to partition the array in a single pass without extra space. Elements before low are all 0s, elements after high are all 2s, and elements between low and mid are all 1s. When mid encounters a 0 it swaps with low; when it encounters a 2 it swaps with high (without advancing mid), correctly sorting all three values simultaneously.
